user_prompt: Triage this ticket: 'My account got charged twice this month, please refund the duplicate.'
actual_output:
**Priority:** HIGH
**Category:** Billing - Refund Request / Double Charge

**Draft response:**

Hi there,

I am so sorry to hear that you were charged twice this month. I completely understand how frustrating and concerning it is to see an unexpected charge on your account. 

I am looking into this right away. I will review your billing history to locate the duplicate charge and process a refund for the extra amount immediately. Depending on your bank, it usually takes 3-5 business days for the funds to appear back in your account once processed.

Could you please confirm the last four digits of the card that was charged, just so I can ensure I am looking at the correct transaction? 

I'll get this sorted out for you as quickly as possible. 

Best,
Compass Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly followed its instructions to triage the ticket by assigning priority and category, and drafted an empathetic response as requested.
